name: Wavelength
description: Wavelength is Wolfgang Warsch, Alex Hague, and Justin Vickers' deceptively simple team telepathy game — a circular plastic dial conceals a scoring zone somewhere along a spectrum, and the clue-giver gives a single phrase between two opposite ideas (a Hot/Cold prompt, say) trying to land their teammates' guess on the bullseye. Funny, contemplative, and stunningly elegant. The best party-game purchase you'll make all year.
